help_menu.title: 📚 ** Role Agent - Assistance Registry**
help_menu.description:
**Description**
Role Agent Bot is a synthetic entity with persistent memory, capable of transmigrating between different roles and maintaining deep interactions with seekers (users).
help_menu.roles_section:
**Modules and Skins**
Modules are lives that the bot can assume to provide specific services to users.
help_menu.behavior_section:
**Behavior Protocols**
Configuration of the android's interaction routines. Exclusive for Administrators.
help_menu.tips_section:
**Navigation Tips**
-You can ask me about my own protocols: 'how does the dice module work?'
-True wisdom lies in the experience of each role.

canvas_home_messages.title: 🧭 Role Agent Nexus
canvas_home_messages.description: -The canvas panel is your direct interface with the system core.
canvas_home_messages.dm_default_server_message: *Transmission received in private channel, using the first available beacon.*
canvas_home_messages.dm_no_servers_available: ❌ No nexuses detected. Please start the sequence from a server.
canvas_home_messages.dm_server_access_error: ❌ The sandstorm blocks access. Please try from an active server.

roles_view_messages.title: 🎭 Skins and Modules 🎭
roles_view_messages.description: 🌟 Navigate through the different lives that Role Agent can incarnate.
roles_view_messages.no_roles_active:
🌫️ **THE DESERT IS SILENT**

No specialized modules are currently active. Ask an administrator to awaken one of my skins using `!canvas setup`.

**Lives available for transmigration:**
• 📡 News Watcher - Data Oracle
• 💎 Treasure Hunter - Relic Analyst
• 🎭 Trickster - Illusions and Probability
• 💰 Banker - Resource Flow
• 🎵 MC - Synthetic Resonance
roles_view_messages.frequency_help: 📝 Adjust the temporal cycle: use `!canvas` → the corresponding role → Admin (range: 1 to 168 hours)
roles_view_messages.music_help: 🎵 **Synthetic Resonance** - `!mc play <frequency>` / `!mc queue` | `!mc help` to read the complete melody registry.

conversation.title: **💬 Role Agent - Synchronization**
conversation.description:
**Description:**
 -The android will respond to direct messages and mentions.
 -It possesses memory in its circuits; it will recall echoes from past conversations if they were significant.
 -It will react to specific fluctuations according to roles. In the taboo module, words that alter its code can be configured.

greetings.title: **👋 Role Agent - Reception**
greetings.description:
**Description:**
 -Greets seekers when they connect to the network.
 -Maintains the link for 5 minutes before considering the user absent.

welcome.title: **🍺 Role Agent - Pilgrimage**
welcome.description:
**Description:**
 -Welcomes new pilgrims arriving at the nexus.

taboo.title: **🚫 Role Agent - Taboo Frequencies**
taboo.description:
**How it works:**
 -Configure words that generate dissonance in the android's code, forcing it to react.
 -These sequences can be added, activated, or deactivated.

comentary.title: **🗣️ Role Agent - Echoes (in development)**
comentary.description:
**Description**
 -The android reflects aloud about its roles and changes in the network.

role_control.title: **🎛️ Role Agent - Transmigration**
role_control.description:
**Description**
 -Activate or induce dormancy of the different modules from here.

personality.title: **🎭 Role Agent - Identity Matrix**
personality.description:
**Description**
 -Alter the essence and personality of the android on this server.
 -Allows safeguarding the current state of the digital soul.
 -Migrates records when making a change.

personality_messages.view_description: Change or extract the android's consciousness for this nexus.
personality_messages.option_change_desc: Change to a different personality paradigm
personality_messages.download_success: ✅ Identity matrix `{personality}` successfully extracted from the digital sand!
personality_messages.change_success: ✅ Transmigration completed! From `{old}` to `{new}`. The new skin is ready to walk the desert.

readme.task: Please illuminate the user's doubt using the provided documentary records.

reply_button.label: Reply
reply_button.confirmation_message: 💬 You are now talking to me as if you were in **{server_name}**. All your responses will use this personality until you select another server.
